messages.formAnnouncement: D&D form for the week of {weekStart}: {formUrl}
messages.reminder: Reminder: {filledCount} people filled the form out of {playerCount} players! {formUrl}
messages.winner: 🎲 This week's session: {slot}. See you there!
messages.tiebreakerIntro: We have a tie between {slots}. Please vote again:
messages.noResponses: No responses received — no session scheduled for this week.
messages.dmUnavailable: 🎲 The DM has no available slots this week — session cancelled.
messages.dmNoResponse: ⏳ The DM hasn't filled the form yet — holding off on picking a slot.
